aximar.title: Programming in Maxima
aximar.description: Functions, loops, conditionals, and list operations.

cells.source:
/* Map a function over a list */
map(lambda([x], x^3), [1, 2, 3, 4, 5])

/* Filter a list */
sublist(makelist(i, i, 1, 20), primep)

/* String operations */
concat("Result is: ", string(integrate(x^2, x)))
